title: wedelia retroflexa
intro: Wedelia retroflexa, also known as the yellow flower or cow's foot, is a flowering plant species in the sunflower family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation, treat fever, and act as an antibacterial agent. The health benefits of Wedelia retroflexa include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce stress, and improve digestion, making it a popular herbal remedy in Ayurvedic medicine. Herbal preparations of Wedelia retroflexa include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
